categories.name: Architectural Drawings
categories.description: 2D/3D drawings defining the building architecture including floor plans, elevations, and sections.

fields.name: drawing_number
fields.description: Unique identifier for the drawing sheet (e.g., A-101).

fields.name: revision
fields.description: Revision code or version of the drawing.

fields.name: sheet_size
fields.description: Physical paper size or sheet format (e.g., A1).

fields.name: author
fields.description: Architect / drafter responsible for the drawing.

fields.name: issue_date
fields.description: Date when the drawing was issued.

categories.name: Structural Drawings
categories.description: Drawings and calculations describing the structural system of the building.

fields.name: drawing_number
fields.description: Unique identifier for the structural drawing.

fields.name: structural_system
fields.description: Type of structural system (e.g., steel, reinforced concrete).

categories.name: Mechanical (HVAC) Documents
categories.description: Plans and specifications related to heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems.

fields.name: equipment
fields.description: HVAC equipment covered in the document.

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Rated capacity of the system (e.g., kW, CFM).

categories.name: Electrical Plans
categories.description: Plans, schematics, and schedules for electrical distribution and devices.

fields.name: drawing_number
fields.description: Unique identifier for the electrical drawing.

fields.name: panel_id
fields.description: Identifier of related panel boards or distribution boards.

categories.name: Plumbing Plans
categories.description: Piping layouts and details for water supply, drainage, and sanitary systems.

fields.name: drawing_number
fields.description: Unique identifier for the plumbing drawing.

fields.name: system_type
fields.description: Type of plumbing system (water supply, drainage, etc.).

categories.name: Fire Safety Documents
categories.description: Drawings, certificates, and reports related to fire detection and suppression systems.

fields.name: document_number
fields.description: Identifier for the fire safety document.

fields.name: system_type
fields.description: Fire protection system type (alarm, sprinkler, extinguisher).

fields.name: certifying_agency
fields.description: Agency or authority certifying the system.

categories.name: Operation & Maintenance Manuals
categories.description: Manuals containing instructions for operation and maintenance of equipment.

categories.name: Contracts & Permits
categories.description: Legal documents including construction contracts, building permits, and approvals.

fields.name: document_title
fields.description: Title of the contract or permit.

fields.name: parties_involved
fields.description: Main parties involved in the contract or permit.

categories.name: Inspection Reports
categories.description: Reports produced after on-site inspections or quality checks.

fields.name: inspector
fields.description: Person or organization performing the inspection.

categories.name: Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS)
categories.description: Safety data sheets detailing hazards and handling of chemical products.

fields.name: issue_date
fields.description: Date of issue of the SDS.

assumptions: The curated categories are derived from typical documentation requirements for commercial building projects and sampled project files.
Field names follow snake_case to standardize key naming conventions across categories.
All date fields should use ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).
This file is intended as a starting point and is expected to be expanded or modified by domain stakeholders.
Additional categories can be added by appending an object to the 'categories' array following the same structure.
